faq.question: What are the camp dates and hours?
faq.answer: Camp runs Monday-Friday, August 3-7, 2026, from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM.

faq.question: What will the kids do?
faq.answer: Kids spend the week cooking and baking real kosher food — including challah — going on trips almost every day, splashing around in the water, and just having a really good time. Jewish values are part of everything we do.

faq.question: How do I register?
faq.answer:
To register, reach out to Chanale directly:

Chanale Vogel
718-473-6570
Chanale@JewishSouthernDelaware.com

We'll get back to you with everything you need.
